---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem or goal
What problem would this solve, or what workflow would it improve?

## Proposed solution
Describe the feature or change you’d like (e.g. new panel, new commandlet, new export format).

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context
Screenshots, mockups, or references to similar tools if helpful.
